scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check renderer.js && node --check preload.js && node --check conversation-providers.js && node --check apikey.js
scripts.package: electron-packager . びくたん --platform=darwin --out=dist --overwrite --no-asar --ignore='^/dist(/|$)' --ignore='^/docs(/|$)' --ignore='^/launchd(/|$)' --ignore='^/\.gitignore$' --ignore='\.log$' && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'dist/びくたん-darwin-arm64/びくたん.app' && echo '.app を作成しました: dist/びくたん-darwin-arm64/'
scripts.build-media-helper: xcrun clang -fblocks -framework Foundation native/now-playing.m -o native/now-playing -arch arm64 -arch x86_64
scripts.package:universal: node scripts/package-universal.mjs && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'dist/びくたん-darwin-universal/びくたん.app'
